entities.name: strategic-partner
entities.context: Command-line tool with multiple modes for strategic thinking and idea development

entities.name: Idea Compounder
entities.context: Mode for concept development with thorough, unhurried exploration and continuous iteration

entities.name: Real-Time Mode
entities.context: Mode that combines idea compounding with real-time tracking, hotwords, and state snapshots

entities.name: Reflection Synthesizer
entities.context: Generates narrative reports, decision memos, insights, and actions at end of sessions

entities.name: Knowledge Base
entities.context: Read-only reference system during iteration that stores hypotheses, past decisions, and strategy

entities.name: Idea compounding
entities.context: Process of continuous iteration on ideas without rushing

entities.name: Real-time tracking
entities.context: Captures hotwords and ideas during iteration sessions

entities.name: Staged updates
entities.context: Knowledge Base updates requiring human approval after synthesis

entities.name: Hotwords
entities.context: Keywords like 'Idea:', 'Mark', 'Snapshot' that trigger specific actions during real-time sessions

relationships.context: Idea Compounder is a mode of strategic-partner
